scripts.build-keycloak-theme: npm run build && keycloakify build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const jar=fs.readdirSync('dist_keycloak').find(f=>f.endsWith('.jar'));if(jar){fs.mkdirSync('../infraestructura/keycloak/themes',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('dist_keycloak/'+jar,'../infraestructura/keycloak/themes/'+jar);console.log('JAR copiado: '+jar);}"
